pi_items.source: GitHub repository description and setup_dbeaver.sh line 138-139

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database (GitHub: lerocha/chinook-database) containing 3503 tracks, of which 214 are video files and 3289 are audio files. The database includes 25 genres and 5 media types. Track 1 has 11170334 bytes and 343719 milliseconds, resulting in a bitrate of 260 kbps. There are 111 non-video audio tracks with bitrate strictly greater than 280 kbps. All metadata paths are correctly specified for task execution.
